query:
SELECT 'leads_old' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE '__TEST__%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'projects_old' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM projects WHERE nome LIKE '__TEST__%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'users_old' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM users WHERE name LIKE '__TEST__%' OR email LIKE '__TEST__%'
